category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/michaellatman/mcp-get describes mcp-get as an archived command-line MCP server discovery/install tool.
source_facts.description says this is a CLI for discovering, installing, and managing MCP servers.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use mcp-get: https://github.com/michaellatman/mcp-get
docs_sources: No separate docs site found; official GitHub README contains Quick Start and Usage Examples sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/michaellatman/mcp-get lists discover, install, manage, update, and uninstall workflows.
source_facts.description identifies MCP server discovery, installation, and management.
